# ArrowBigUp

## Tags
shift, keyboard, button, mac, capitalize, capitalise, forward, direction, north

## Categories
arrows, text, development, gaming

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/arrow-big-up)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ArrowBigUp;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ArrowBigUp { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
